    "Activity A (Mobilize & layout) requires 2 extra workdays due to rework discovered at handoff."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Update the project schedule to reflect a 2-day delay to the project finish date.",
    "Investigate if subsequent activities on the critical path can be compressed to recover the 2 days."
  ],
  "rationale": "Activity A is the very first activity in a linear sequence of critical path dependencies (A -> B -> C -> CC -> D -> E -> F/G/H -> I -> J -> K -> L -> M -> N -> O/P -> Q). Because there is zero float on this critical path, any delay to Activity A directly translates to an equal delay to the final project completion date. Therefore, the project finish is delayed by exactly 2 workdays.",
  "references": [
    "Critical Path Method (CPM) scheduling standards"
  ]
}
